user.title: BMW CE 04 — Connect
user.description: Enter your BMW CarData Client ID.

authorize.title: BMW CE 04 — Authorize
authorize.description:
**Step 1** — Open this page in your browser:
**{verification_uri}**

**Step 2** — Sign in with your BMW account if prompted, then enter this code:
`{user_code}`

**Step 3** — Approve the request, return to Home Assistant, and click **Submit**.

The code is valid for only a few minutes. Shortcut: {verification_uri_complete} opens the page with the code already filled in.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to reach BMW CarData. Check your client ID and network.
error.authorize_failed: Authorization failed. Make sure you approved the device in the BMW portal.
